items.title: Humanlike
items.description: Appears mostly human with subtle uncanny features like glowing eyes, unnatural beauty, or slight asymmetry

items.title: Animal-Touched
items.description: Humanoid form with animal features such as ears, tails, claws, horns, or fur patches

items.title: Bestial Hybrid
items.description: Strong blend of human and animal, such as digitigrade legs, elongated snouts, or full body fur

items.title: Animal-Folk
items.description: Fully anthropomorphic animal form with human posture and intelligence

items.title: Feral
items.description: Closer to a natural animal form but with heightened intelligence or unnatural presence

items.title: Sprite
items.description: Small humanoid with wings, glowing aura, and delicate or exaggerated features

items.title: Tiny Folk
items.description: Very small beings, often insect-like or doll-like in scale and proportions

items.title: Elemental
items.description: Body composed of or infused with elements like fire, water, stone, or air

items.title: Nature-Bound
items.description: Covered in vines, bark, mushrooms, or flowers; deeply tied to natural environments

items.title: Mythical Beast
items.description: Takes the form of legendary creatures like dragons, unicorns, or griffins

items.title: Chimera
items.description: Combination of multiple animals or unnatural traits fused into one body

items.title: Ethereal
items.description: Partially intangible, glowing, or translucent form

items.title: Shadow Form
items.description: Body made of darkness, silhouettes, or shifting void-like matter

items.title: Dreamlike
items.description: Unstable or surreal appearance that shifts subtly over time

items.title: Giant
items.description: Massive humanoid form with exaggerated size and presence

items.title: Doll-like
items.description: Porcelain, wooden, or artificial appearance resembling a crafted figure

items.title: Masked
items.description: Face obscured or replaced by a fixed mask or symbolic visage

items.title: Corrupted
items.description: Twisted, decayed, or warped form reflecting dark or broken glamour

items.title: Nightmare
items.description: Designed to inspire fear, with exaggerated, unsettling, or predatory features

items.title: Construct
items.description: Made of clockwork, crystal, or other artificial materials

items.title: Fluid Form
items.description: Body constantly shifting like liquid, smoke, or mist

items.title: Symbolic
items.description: Embodies a concept (season, emotion, idea) visually rather than physically

items.title: Courtier
items.description: Seelie: Upholds tradition, honor, and social order. Unseelie: Manipulates status and politics for personal gain.

items.title: Paladin
items.description: Seelie: Protects others and defends ideals. Unseelie: Enforces their will through strength and intimidation.

items.title: Sage
items.description: Seelie: Seeks knowledge and wisdom. Unseelie: Hoards secrets and uses them as leverage.

items.title: Artist
items.description: Seelie: Creates beauty and inspires others. Unseelie: Obsesses over expression, often destructively.

items.title: Wayfarer
items.description: Seelie: Explores the world with curiosity. Unseelie: Wanders restlessly, never satisfied.

items.title: Oracle
items.description: Seelie: Guides others with visions. Unseelie: Delivers cryptic or disturbing truths.

items.title: Regent
items.description: Seelie: Rules with responsibility and duty. Unseelie: Seeks control and domination.

items.title: Warrior
items.description: Seelie: Fights to defend and protect. Unseelie: Thrives on violence and conflict.

items.title: Rogue
items.description: Seelie: Clever trickster who bends rules. Unseelie: Deceiver who exploits others.

items.title: Fool
items.description: Seelie: Brings humor and perspective. Unseelie: Causes chaos and disruption.

items.title: Rebel
items.description: Seelie: Challenges unjust authority. Unseelie: Rejects all control and structure.

items.title: Outlaw
items.description: Seelie: Breaks rules for a cause. Unseelie: Thrives in lawlessness.

items.title: Loner
items.description: Seelie: Independent and self-reliant. Unseelie: Isolates and distrusts others.

items.title: Mystic
items.description: Seelie: Seeks spiritual connection. Unseelie: Dives into dangerous or forbidden magic.

items.title: Schemer
items.description: Seelie: Plans carefully for the future. Unseelie: Manipulates events from the shadows.

items.title: Monster
items.description: Seelie: Struggles to control darker impulses. Unseelie: Embraces fear and monstrous nature.

items.title: Chicanery
items.description: Illusion, misdirection, and deception affecting perception

items.title: Legerdemain
items.description: Telekinesis and manipulation of objects at a distance

items.title: Primal
items.description: Control over natural forces like fire, weather, and elements

items.title: Soothsay
items.description: Divination, prophecy, and reading fate

items.title: Spring
items.description: Growth, renewal, healing, and vitality

items.title: Summer
items.description: Strength, aggression, and destructive force

items.title: Sovereign
items.description: Command, authority, and social dominance

items.title: Wayfare
items.description: Movement, speed, and travel

items.title: Fae
items.description: Manipulation of raw Glamour and fae essence

items.title: Chronos
items.description: Manipulation of time and temporal flow

items.title: Contract
items.description: Binding oaths, deals, and enforced agreements
